message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "clause_text": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement. In the event of such cancellation, Developer shall deliver to Company all work in progress, program specifications, etc., then in Developer’s possession. Cancellation pursuant to such failure to deliver shall not require any further payments to Developer as normally required pursuant to Clause 19.",
      "clause_name": "Termination Clause",
      "clause_type": "termination",
      "summary": "Outlines the conditions under which the Company can cancel the Phase Agreement due to Developer's failure to deliver on time.",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "impact": "Potential loss of investment if the Developer fails to deliver, leading to cancellation of the agreement.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure clear timelines are established and adhered to.",
        "Consider including penalties for delays to incentivize timely delivery."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "1d3092a3-4144-4005-a6d7-edb54adbe06f",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………… [insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement delivery after the date specified in the Phase Agreement, but prior to the expiration of a grace period of …….. [insert number] days, Company shall pay to Developer [%] of the price for that Phase.",
      "clause_name": "Delivery Failure Clause",
      "clause_type": "liability",
      "summary": "Specifies the consequences for the Developer if they fail to deliver the programming on time.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Financial implications for the Developer if they do not meet delivery deadlines.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Define specific penalties for late delivery to mitigate risk.",
        "Establish a clear grace period and conditions for payment adjustments."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.8",
      "source_clause_id": "482cd66c-ca7a-4b17-8535-93ba0845d9a9",
      "source_excerpt": "Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………… [insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase, Developer was paid [%] for the delivery of the programs, Company shall pay to Developer ……. [insert number] % for the passing of the Acceptance Test.",
      "clause_name": "Payment Upon Acceptance",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "Details the payment structure contingent upon the successful passing of the acceptance test.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Ensures Developer receives payment only after meeting quality standards.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Clearly define acceptance test criteria to avoid disputes.",
        "Consider including a timeline for acceptance testing to expedite payments."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.11",
      "source_clause_id": "f5e0cb07-9c1b-481d-9b70-9bed8869e675",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test. Company shall then confirm such notice by sending written confirmation of the failure plus proper documentation to Developer by certified mail, return receipt requested.",
      "clause_name": "Acceptance Test Failure Procedure",
      "clause_type": "dispute resolution",
      "summary": "Establishes the procedure for notifying the Developer of acceptance test failures.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Provides a clear process for addressing failures, reducing potential disputes.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure both parties are aware of the notification process.",
        "Consider including timelines for response and remediation."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "65a8de99-bd28-4e5d-97f4-ca189e42ae59",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon the signing of the Phase Agreement by both Company and Developer, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the fixed cost indicated in the Phase Agreement.",
      "clause_name": "Initial Payment Clause",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "Specifies the initial payment due upon signing the Phase Agreement.",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "impact": "Ensures Developer receives upfront payment to commence work.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Define the percentage clearly to avoid confusion.",
        "Consider linking initial payments to specific milestones."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.6",
      "source_clause_id": "cd83ac05-51eb-4ffb-b923-50263f37c351",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon the signing of the Phase Agreement by both Company and Developer, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the fixed cost indicated in the Phase Agreement."
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Developer shall consult with Company personnel for the purpose of designing programming specifications. Specifications shall contain those items listed on Annex I.",
      "clause_name": "Consultation Clause",
      "clause_type": "other",
      "summary": "Mandates consultation between Developer and Company for programming specifications.",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "impact": "Facilitates collaboration and clarity in project requirements.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure regular meetings are scheduled to maintain communication.",
        "Document all specifications clearly to avoid misunderstandings."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.1",
      "source_clause_id": "006d9839-ccae-4427-b454-0b1e923548a5",
      "source_excerpt": "Developer shall consult with Company personnel for the purpose of designing programming specifications."
    }
  ]
}
